stages.concept:
# Unit 136: 관계부사 why, how - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계부사 why, how**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **why** — 선행사가 **이유** (the reason) (= for which)

> Tell me the reason **why** you were late.
> 네가 왜 늦었는지 이유를 말해줘.
> = Tell me the reason **for which** you were late.

> That's the reason **why** I like her.
> 그것이 내가 그녀를 좋아하는 이유이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **how** — 선행사가 **방법** (the way) (= in which)

> This is **how** I solved the problem.
> 이렇게 내가 그 문제를 풀었다.
> = This is **the way (in which)** I solved the problem.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **the way와 how는 함께 쓸 수 없어요!**

> ❌ This is **the way how** I did it.
> ✅ This is **the way** I did it.
> ✅ This is **how** I did it.

**Q. 다음 중 어법상 '틀린' 문장을 고르세요.**
1. Tell me the reason why you are crying.
2. I don't know the way how she makes this cake. ✅
3. This is how he became rich.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정확해요! 선행사 the way와 관계부사 how는 둘 중 하나만 써야지 절대로 나란히 붙여서 함께 쓸 수 없답니다. (the way만 쓰거나, how만 쓰거나!)

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정리:

| 관계부사 | 선행사 | = 전치사 + which |
|------|------|------|
| when | 시간 (the time/day) | at/on/in which |
| where | 장소 (the place) | at/in/on which |
| why | 이유 (the reason) | for which |
| how | 방법 (the way) | in which |

🧑‍🎓 학생: why(이유), how(방법)! the way how는 함께 못 쓴다는 것도 기억!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 136: 관계부사 why, how - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I know the reason (     ) she's angry.
> **정답** why

---

**02.** This is ? he solved the problem.
> **정답** how

---

**03.** Tell me the reason ? you were late.
> **정답** why

---

**04.** I don't understand ? she did it.
> **정답** how

---

**05.** That's the reason ? I like this book.
> **정답** why

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I know the reason how she cried.
(이유)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** how → why

---

**07.** This is why he made the cake.
(방법)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** why → how

---

**08.** Tell me the reason where you were absent.
(이유)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** where → why

---

**09.** I learned the way why she studied.
(방법)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** why → how (또는 the way she studied)

---

**10.** That's the reason when I don't like him.
(이유)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** when → why

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 그녀가 화난 이유를 안다.
I know the reason she's angry.
> **정답** why

---

**12.** 이것이 그가 문제를 푼 방법이다.
This is he solved the problem.
> **정답** how

---

**13.** 그가 늦은 이유를 말해 줘.
Tell me the reason he was late.
> **정답** why

---

**14.** 나는 이것을 만드는 방법을 모르겠다.
I don't know to make this.
> **정답** how

---

**15.** 그것이 내가 이 책을 좋아하는 이유이다.
That's the reason I like this book.
> **정답** why

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀가 화난 이유를 안다.
know I the reason why she is angry
> **정답** I / know / the / reason / why / she / is / angry

---

**17.** 이것이 그가 성공한 방법이다.
This how is he succeeded
> **정답** This / is / how / he / succeeded

---

**18.** 내가 늦은 이유를 말해 줄게.
tell I'll you the reason why I was late
> **정답** I'll / tell / you / the / reason / why / I / was / late

---

**19.** 이것을 만드는 방법을 알려 줘.
Tell how me to make this
> **정답** Tell / me / how / to / make / this

---

**20.** 그것이 내가 영어를 공부하는 이유이다.
That's the reason why study I English
> **정답** That's / the / reason / why / I / study / English
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 136: 관계부사 why, how - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
This is the reason _______ she contacts me.
how
when
where
why
> **정답** why

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
That's the way _______ the water is filtered out.
how
why
필요 없음
where
> **정답** 필요 없음

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They know _______ why they should help people in
need.
the way
the day
the reason
the place
> **정답** the reason

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
She wonders the reason _______ which he changed
jobs.
for
on
at
in
> **정답** for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
Amy found the book _______ which she was
looking.
Tom wants to know the reason _______ which his
brother was upset.
to
for
on
in
> **정답** for

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They don't understand the way how he
presented the new idea.
I think I know the reason why she's crying.
He wonders the reason why she travels alone.
I don't like the way he treats us.
> **정답** They don't understand the way how he presented
the new idea.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They studied the way how they won the war.
I know the reason why he wanted to go to the
university.
I know the reason why he didn't go to school.
This is how they find their way in the
mountains.
> **정답** They studied the way how they won the war.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He wonders the reason why the pants are
popular.
I don't know how they won the game.
I need to know the way why she was late.
They asked me the way how I made the
special pizza.
> **정답** I don't know how they won the game., He wonders
the reason why the pants are popular.

---

**09.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바른 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
He is learning the way.
He edits the video in that way.
He is learning the way he edits the video.
He is learning the way how he edits the video.
He is learning the way he edits the video in
that way.
He is learning how he edits the video.
> **정답** He is learning the way he edits the video., He is
learning how he edits the video.

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바른 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
They think the reason.
The Earth gets warmer and warmer for that reason.
They think the reason when the Earth gets
warmer and warmer.
They think the reason for which the Earth gets
warmer and warmer.
They think the reason why the Earth gets
warmer and warmer.
They think the reason how the Earth gets
warmer and warmer.
> **정답** They think the reason why the Earth gets warmer
and warmer., They think the reason for which the
Earth gets warmer and warmer.

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바른 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
That's the reason.
Tom lives in Jeju Island for that reason.
That's the reason why Tom lives in Jeju
Island.
That's the reason for which Tom lives in Jeju
Island.
That's the reason how Tom lives in Jeju
Island.
That's why Tom lives in Jeju Island for the
reason.
> **정답** That's the reason why Tom lives in Jeju Island.,
That's the reason for which Tom lives in Jeju Island.

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을
모두 고르시오. [2개]
She asked us the way.
We succeeded in the way.
She asked us the way we succeeded.
She asked us the way which we succeeded.
She asked us the way how we succeeded.
She asked us how we succeeded.
> **정답** She asked us the way how we succeeded., She asked
us the way which we succeeded.

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I think about the reason __________________.
how the theory is tested.
why the animals are in the zoo.
where the book is.
when they go to home.
> **정답** why the animals are in the zoo.

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The boy wants to know the way ______________.
why he gave her the ring.
where the meeting is held.
she plays soccer well.
how the team won the game.
> **정답** she plays soccer well.

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
They knew the important reason _______ she left.
I wonder the way _______ the company hired
employees.
필요 없음 - how
how - why
why - how
why - 필요 없음
> **정답** why - 필요 없음

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이것은 우리에게 호랑이가 사는 법을 알려준다.
This tells us why tigers live.
This tells us that tigers live.
This tells us how tigers live.
This tells us which tigers live.
> **정답** This tells us how tigers live.

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 이 문제가 잘못된 이유를 설명하지 못했다.
He couldn't explain the way how this problem
was wrong.
He couldn't explain what this problem was
wrong.
He couldn't explain the reason why this
problem was wrong.
He couldn't explain which this problem was
wrong.
> **정답** He couldn't explain the reason why this problem was
wrong.

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
I want to know the reason in that she's angry.
→ I want to know the reason she's angry.
> **정답** why (for which)

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
She doesn't like the way how her son cleans the
house.
→ She doesn't like her son
cleans the house.
> **정답** the way (how)

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
She was crying when I saw her. I wondered
the reason how she was crying. But I didn't
ask her that. Instead, I comforted her.
Fortunately, the way I comforted her
worked. She soon stopped crying.
> **정답** was crying, why, ask, the way, crying
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 136 관계부사 why, how중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Tom은 나에게 한국이 추운 이유를 물어보았다.
힌트 (     ) be cold
Tom asked me  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 the, reason, why (for which), Korea, is, cold

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 그 회사가 발전한 방법이 궁금하다.
힌트 (     ) the company, have developed
We wonder  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 how (the way), the, company, has, developed

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Raina는 그들이 왜 놀라는지 알지 못 한다.
힌트 (     ) be surprised
Raina doesn't know  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 the, reason, why (for which), they, are, surprised

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 그녀가 우리에게 말하는 방식을 좋아한다. [talk to]
I like  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 how (the way), she, talks, to, us

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈 칸을 채우시오.
She knows the reason for which he called her.
She knows the reason  (     )  he called her.
정답 why

---

**06.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈 칸을 채우시오.
The boy learned how he makes the food.
The boy learned  (     )  he makes the
food.
정답 the way

---

**07.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈 칸을 채우시오.
The coach changed the way the team played
soccer.
The coach changed  (     )  the team played soccer.
정답 how

---

**08.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 빈 칸을 채우시오.
Students learned the reason why water freezes in
science class.
Students learned the reason  (     )  water
freezes in science class.
정답 for which

---

**09.** 다음 두 문장을 관계부사를 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
That's the reason.
I drink coffee for that reason.
That's  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 the, reason, why (for which), I, drink, coffee

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장을 관계부사를 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
He was surprised at the way.
we escaped from the island in that way.
He was surprised at  (     )  
  (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 how (the way), we, escaped, from, the, island

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 136: 관계부사 why, how - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
This is the reason _______ he studies hard. how when where why
> 정답: why

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
That's the way _______ the machine works. how why 필요 없음 where
> 정답: 필요 없음

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They know _______ why they should protect the environment. the way the day the reason the place
> 정답: the reason

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
He wonders the reason _______ which she moved to another city. for on at in
> 정답: for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 전치사를 고르시오.
Amy found the pen _______ which she was searching.
Tom wants to know the reason _______ which his sister was upset. to for on in
> 정답: for

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They don't understand the way how she solved the puzzle.
I think I know the reason why he's worried.
She wonders the reason why he exercises alone.
I don't like the way she talks to us.
> 정답: They don't understand the way how she solved

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They studied the way how they built the bridge.
I know the reason why she wanted to join the club.
I know the reason why he didn't come to class.
This is how they find fresh water in the desert.
> 정답: They studied the way how they built the bridge.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She wonders the reason why the shoes are popular.
I don't know how they solved the puzzle.
I need to know the way why she was absent.
They asked me the way how I made the special cake.
> 정답: I don't know how they solved the puzzle., She wonders

---

**09.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바른 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He is learning the way.
She edits the photo in that way.
He is learning the way she edits the photo.
He is learning the way how she edits the photo.
He is learning the way she edits the photo in that way.
He is learning how she edits the photo.
> 정답: He is learning the way she edits the photo., He is learning how she edits the photo.

---

**10.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바른 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) They think the reason.
The ice melts faster for that reason.
They think the reason when the ice melts faster.
They think the reason for which the ice melts faster.
They think the reason why the ice melts faster.
They think the reason how the ice melts faster.
> 정답: They think the reason why the ice melts faster

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바른 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) That's the reason.
Amy lives in the countryside for that reason.
That's the reason why Amy lives in the countryside.
That's the reason for which Amy lives in the countryside.
That's the reason how Amy lives in the countryside.
That's why Amy lives in the countryside for the reason.
> 정답: That's the reason why Amy lives in the countryside.,

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He asked us the way.
We won the match in the way.
He asked us the way we won the match.
He asked us the way which we won the match.
He asked us the way how we won the match.
He asked us how we won the match.
> 정답: He asked us the way how we won the match., He asked

---

**13.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I think about the reason __________________.
how the experiment is done. why the birds migrate south. where the book is. when they leave for home.
> 정답: why the birds migrate south.

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The girl wants to know the way ______________.
why he gave her the gift. where the concert is held. she plays the piano well. how the band won the contest.
> 정답: she plays the piano well.

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
They knew the important reason _______ she quit.
I wonder the way _______ the factory produced items. 필요 없음 - how how - why why - how why - 필요 없음
> 정답: why - 필요 없음

---

**16.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이것은 우리에게 고래가 사는 법을 알려준다.
This tells us why whales live.
This tells us that whales live.
This tells us how whales live.
This tells us which whales live.
> 정답: This tells us how whales live.

---

**17.** 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 이 계획이 실패한 이유를 설명하지 못했다.
She couldn't explain the way how this plan failed.
She couldn't explain what this plan failed.
She couldn't explain the reason why this plan failed.
She couldn't explain which this plan failed.
> 정답: She couldn't explain the reason why this plan failed.

---

**18.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
I want to know the reason in that he's upset. → I want to know the reason he's upset.
> 정답: why (for which)

---

**19.** 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 고쳐 쓰시오.
He doesn't like the way how his daughter cleans her room. → He doesn't like his daughter cleans her room.
> 정답: the way (how)

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 틀린 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
He was upset when I saw him.
I wondered the reason how he was upset.
But I didn't ask him that.
Instead, I cheered him up.
Fortunately, the way I cheered him up worked.
He soon felt better.
> 정답: was upset, why, ask, the way, felt better
